title: Basic Weapons Retexture
description: A retexture of Basic Weapons by Khazoda
body:
A resource pack that changes the weapon textures of the mod [Basic Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/basicweapons) by Khazoda. This pack aims to give the textures a more updated and sleek feel.

Feel free to use this texture pack however you please as long as I am credited.

**This should work for all versions of the mod.**
